label_notes: Source: training knowledge (live fetch blocked). Etsy is generally transparent about data collection for marketplace operations. Key practice: does not sell personal data to third parties for marketing, but shares with advertising partners. Users can access and delete their data. Primary gaps are around AI use and advanced privacy signal support.
